creative_brief.visual_style: Minimalistic design with a modern edge, utilizing vibrant and earthy illustrations that reflect the natural ingredients and sustainability message
creative_brief.conceptual_technique: Integrated digital campaigns leveraging social media platforms like Instagram and TikTok, influencer partnerships, and experiential marketing events
creative_brief.typography_style: Sans-serif fonts with a clean and bold look to ensure readability and convey a modern, straightforward brand ethos
creative_brief.color_scheme: Earth tones like oat beige, leafy green, and sky blue to evoke a sense of nature and wholesomeness
creative_brief.headline: Milk, but made from oats.
creative_brief.ad_style: Integrated digital campaigns leveraging social media platforms like Instagram and TikTok, influencer partnerships, and experiential marketing events
key_benefits: Sustainable and environmentally friendly production process
Rich, creamy texture similar to dairy milk
High nutritional value with added vitamins and minerals
creative_brief.product_highlight: Commitment to sustainability and eco-friendly practices in production

creative_brief.visual_style: Minimalistic design with bold, quirky graphics; emphasize natural elements and sustainability with imagery of oats and greenery

creative_brief.typography_style: Sans-serif fonts with a clean and modern feel, such as 'Helvetica Neue' to convey clarity and approachability; consider a custom hand-drawn type for a unique brand signature
creative_brief.color_scheme: Earthy tones with pops of vibrant blue to symbolize both freshness and sustainability
